meaning: n.环,环形物,环状,铃声,声调,打电话,拳击场vt.包围,套住,按铃,敲钟vi.成环形,响,鸣,敲钟,回响,按铃
examples: I'll give you a ring tomorrow.
That ring must be worth a fortune.
I could never part with this ring.
On the horizon are the crater walls, now a ring of tree-covered mountains and national parks.
And Mr. Bonds says on the Web site, my quest for a World Series ring continues.
